metadata.description: Open-source Claude Code plugins & skills by MECoban. Built for humans and AI agents.

plugins.name: garmin-ai-coach
plugins.description: Access Garmin Connect health/fitness data and build AI coaching — Cloudflare-aware auth (cloudscraper + garminconnect 0.2.38, ~1yr token), daily sync, scheduled coaching routines. Bundles the 'garmin-connect' skill.
